title: Fused facility-risk incident
whatHappened: A synthetic facility asset is exposed to an elevated fire-weather corridor while a passive cyber exposure and operator field report increase operational concern.
whyWeBelieveIt: The hazard fixture places a high-severity fire-weather alert near the facility corridor.
The asset fixture identifies a critical facility inside the affected area.
The cyber fixture records a passive CVE exposure against the facility vendor stack.
The field report fixture independently reports visible smoke, impaired access, and degraded local communications.
operationalRisk: Critical synthetic demo risk: continuity, access, and cyber resilience should be reviewed, but active scanning or external action is not authorized in fixture mode.

gatedActions.action: Run live scanner against facility infrastructure

notes: First Orion decision-card fixture for OSIRIS excavation.
